---
name: Change request
about: Request an implementation, refactor, or governance change
title: '[Change] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the requested change.

## Why this is needed

Explain the problem, constraint, or opportunity.

## Scope

- [ ] Runtime behavior
- [ ] Architecture boundary
- [ ] CI or coverage gate
- [ ] Deployment or staging continuation
- [ ] Documentation or contracts

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Architecture impact is explicit
- [ ] Documentation updates in English are identified
- [ ] Validation and coverage expectations are identified
- [ ] Cross-repository implications are identified when applicable

## Notes

Add rollout, dependency, or follow-up details here.
